message:
fix(mux): use per-FBO PBO state to fix multi-panel race condition

Multiple panels were sharing a global PBO state, causing:
- Panel A's pixel data overwritten by Panel B's async read
- Flashing/flickering between panels at ~1s intervals

Changes:
- Replace global_pbo_state with PboStateManager (per-FBO mapping)
- Each FBO gets its own PBO double-buffer state (up to 16 surfaces)
- Add cleanupPboState() called from Surface.deinit()
- Read directly from renderer's last_target FBO (no extra blit)
- Remove global offscreen FBO (was causing duplicate state issues)
